# BEGIN: MANUAL
- generate testcases in gherkin format with positive, negative and edge cases
- Given should be in background which should contain (Given login to application)
- create a new file with reasonable name under folder test\local\app-angular\
- In all Scenario titles and steps, always refer to the subject as "user" instead of "I"
- When and And for performing actions
- Then for assertions and expected outcomes.
- Each scenario must conclude with a Then step. No step should follow the final Then
# END: MANUAL
